evidence_summary: Nathan Curnow's Ghost Poetry - ABC Radio National Skip to main content Skip to radionational navigation, settings and search Explore the ABC ABC listen Search Loading ABC RN Program: Nathan Curnow's Ghost Poetry Program:The Book Show Wed 31 Dec 2008 at 10:28amWed 31 Dec 2008 at 10:28am Wed 31 Dec 2008 at 10:28am Sorry, this audio is not yet available or has expired Presented by Sarah L'Estrange If you go to Port Arthur in Tasmania there's a display of photos at the entrance that have been sent in by visitors to the prison. These are strange images that are hard to explain—like a shadow where none should be—is it a trick of the light, or a ghost captured on film? Many visitors experience Port Arthur as spooky—as if the suffering of its inmates has.
